sentences.sentence: Printers are located near the entrance.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (printers, located, entrance)

sentences.sentence: Replacement chargers can be borrowed from the front counter.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress placement in compound noun (front counter); linking (can_be_borrowed)

sentences.sentence: Software updates are installed on all machines every evening.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-tes in, instal-led); reduced function words (on all)

sentences.sentence: Please save your documents to the shared network drive.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (documents, network); reduced function words (to the)

sentences.sentence: The print queue can be accessed from any campus computer.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (can_be_accessed); consonant cluster (print)

sentences.sentence: Headsets and webcams are included with each workstation.
sentences.phonetic_focus: final consonant clusters (-sets, -cams); linking (is_included)

sentences.sentence: If you cannot log in, check the help guide posted by the main desk for the correct steps.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundary (cannot_log_in); reduced function words in rapid sequence (by the, for the); final consonant cluster at phrase boundary (correct steps)

sentences.sentence: First, flip the bike upside down.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (first, flip, upside)

sentences.sentence: Loosen the bolts and lift your rear wheel out.
sentences.phonetic_focus: final consonant cluster (bolts); linking (lift_your); reduced function word (and)

sentences.sentence: Press the tire levers under the rim to free the tube.
sentences.structure: imperative with prepositional phrase and infinitive
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (press); linking (under_the, free_the); reduced function words (to the)

sentences.sentence: Inflate the tube slightly and listen for escaping air.
sentences.structure: imperative with compound verb and adverb
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables in multi-syllable word (slightly, escaping); linking (listen_for)

sentences.sentence: Mark the puncture and spread a thin layer of glue.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (mark, spread); linking (layer_of); reduced function word (of)

sentences.sentence: Once the glue feels tacky, press the patch down firmly for one full minute.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress-timing across long sentence; reduced function words in rapid sequence (for one); consonant cluster at phrase boundary (press the patch)

sentences.sentence: Before you put the wheel back on, pump the tire up and check that the patch holds the pressure.
sentences.structure: fronted temporal clause + compound imperative (final step)
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress-timing across 19 words; linked speech across clause boundary (before_you); reduced function words (the, that the); final cluster (holds)

sentences.sentence: The rose garden lies straight ahead.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (rose, garden, straight, ahead)

sentences.sentence: Rare orchids are displayed inside the glass greenhouse.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (glass greenhouse); stress placement in compound noun (greenhouse); linking (are_displayed)

sentences.sentence: Please stay on the gravel paths between the flower beds.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (gravel paths, beds); stress placement in compound noun (flower beds); linking (stay_on)

sentences.sentence: Guided tours of the herb garden run through the afternoon.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking (run_through); reduced function words (of the); stress placement in compound noun (herb garden)

sentences.sentence: The pond at the center attracts many native birds.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (attracts); linking (pond_at); reduced syllable (native)

sentences.sentence: If you want to rest for our break, the benches near the fountain offer plenty of shade.
sentences.phonetic_focus: conditional intonation pattern (rising in if-clause, falling in main clause); reduced function words in rapid sequence (for our, of); linking (want_to)

sentences.sentence: When you are ready to explore on your own, check the map for the locations of each seasonal exhibit.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundary (when_you_are); reduced function words in rapid sequence (to, on your, for the, of); stress-timing across 19 words
